# truenas_iscsi_global (Resource)

Manages the TrueNAS global iSCSI configuration. This is a singleton resource.

~> **Note:** This is a singleton resource — only one instance exists per TrueNAS system. Destroying this resource only removes it from Terraform state without modifying the appliance configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "truenas_iscsi_global" "config" {
  basename = "iqn.2005-10.org.freenas.ctl"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `basename` (String) The base name for iSCSI targets (e.g. iqn.2005-10.org.freenas.ctl).

### Optional

- `alua` (Boolean) Enable Asymmetric Logical Unit Access.
- `isns_servers` (List of String) List of iSNS server addresses.
- `listen_port` (Number) The TCP port iSCSI listens on. Defaults to 3260.
- `pool_avail_threshold` (Number) Pool available space threshold percentage for alerts.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The identifier (always 1 for singleton config).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import truenas_iscsi_global.config 1
```
